title: Incorrect result due to the skip-ahead-distinct optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t2(x, y) VALUES(1, 1.5), (2, NULL), (3, 3.5);
SELECT DISTINCT y FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON b = x WHERE b IS NOT NULL AND y IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: skip-ahead-distinct optimization after ANALYZE is run
